title: Glob tool output view component with file count and status display
purpose: Displays the output of a glob tool call with pattern, path, file count, and formatted output panel.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named GlobView that renders tool call information including pattern, path, file count, and output using an OutputPanel component.

steps.content: Extract input properties from the tool call item, defaulting to empty object.
Extract and normalize the output string from the tool call item.
Calculate the number of non-empty lines in the output to determine file count.
Determine the status of the tool call based on error and status properties.
Render the pattern and path information if present.
Display the file count if output exists.
Pass the tool use ID, status, output, error, and format to the OutputPanel component.
